details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. Expected top-level subdirectories reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to both exist; only reports/audit/ is present.
reports/board/ directory missing — governance contract requires both reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to exist.

Deprecated moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active Python modules: board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, agents/. This directory should have been removed per governance policy.

Moltbot/clawdbot references found in code/config files (excluding audit/docs that document removal): moltbot/ directory (6 Python files), scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py, alpaca_codebase_payload.txt, board/eod/out/2026-02-12/cron_diagnosis.json, board/eod/out/2026-02-13/cron_diagnosis.json.
